_description: Per-layer phi (φ) calibration offsets for sim-to-real correction. Applied as: metric_corrected = metric_sim + phi_offset. All zeros = simulation only. Place actual metric corrections under 'offsets' sub-dict.

L._notes: IGZO TFT. Bind via ~5 Hall mobility + XRD runs. Main gap: O2 flow variability (+-30%). TODO: fetch IGZO open dataset.

_sources: Delaney et al. 2020 (Adv. Funct. Mater. 10.1002/adfm.202002447): n_amorph=3.285, n_cryst=4.050, delta_n=0.765 at 1550 nm
Confirmed by Delaney 2021 (Sci. Adv.), Alam 2022 (Adv. Opt. Mat.), Alkhazraji 2023 (Opt. Mat. Expr.), Chen 2025 (Adv. Phys. Res.)
PM._notes: Model uses Clausius-Mossotti element mixing which does NOT reconstruct Sb2Se3 compound optical constants (orthorhombic structure has emergent polarisability). Model underpredicts delta_n by 44.8% for pure Sb2Se3 — structural limitation, not just calibration offset. Champion formula (Sb2:Se3:Ge:Cl) has Ge/Cl dopants with unknown effect on real delta_n. k NOT calibrated: literature k < 1e-5 is below ellipsometry detection limit; applying phi would give unrealistic k near zero. Update when >=3 ellipsometry measurements of champion film deposited on SiO2/Si at target conditions.
PM._excluded_correction: loss_k: literature says k < 1e-5 (detection floor) for pure Sb2Se3; champion Ge+Cl dopants may raise k; sputtered film roughness also contributes; no reliable literature value for champion formula.

E._notes: HZO ferroelectric. Bind via P-E loop + C-V. Main gap: wake-up cycling shifts Pr by +20-40% (not in model). No open dataset found.

_sources: PMC9030765: x=0.20, d33=9.9 pC/N (pulsed DC magnetron, Si/Mo, 300C)
PMC8585448: x=0.29, d33=12.6 pC/N (pulsed DC magnetron, SOI, 300C)
Multi-group consensus: x=0.40, d33=19.2 pC/N (standard sputtering, ~350C)
EM._excluded: Akiyama 2009 dual-reactive cosputtering (x=0.43, 27.6 pC/N) excluded: different technique, -59% model error
EM._notes: Model underpredicts d33 by 8.9% vs standard reactive magnetron sputtering. phi=+1.5 pC/N at champion (Sc0.38/Si/490C). Update when 5+ measurements from actual deposition system available.
